title: Fix dark mode flash-of-light-theme on page load
description:
When dark mode is enabled, there's a visible flash of light theme before React hydrates and applies the dark mode class. Fix by injecting a synchronous script in the HTML <head> that reads the dark mode preference from localStorage and applies the class before the browser paints.

Acceptance criteria:
- No visible flash of light theme when dark mode is enabled
- Dark mode preference persists across page reloads
- Works on initial visit (respects system preference if no localStorage value)

Dev Lead.notes: Clean fix. Blocking script runs before hydration. Uses correct localStorage key.
